Part.Source:
Event Start
retornaAutorizacao.Call('WWPRODUTO', Status_SimNao.Nao, 2, &EditarProduto) sdtFichaEstoque__VlrCus.Visible = &EditarProduto > 1
retornaAutorizacao.Call('WPFICHAESTOQUE', Status_SimNao.Sim, 1, &AutNiv)
LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) &EmpCod = &Context.EmpCod &PesCod = &Context.PesCod &FilCod = &Context.FilCod
//FILIAL COMBO &FilCod.Clear() DpFilialAcesso.Call(&EmpCod,&PesCod, &sdtFilialAcesso) for &sdtFilialAcessoItem in &sdtFilialAcesso &FilCod.AddItem(&sdtFilialAcessoItem.PesFilAce, &sdtFilialAcessoItem.PesFilAceNom) EndFor
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
tb3.Width = 170 UnnamedTable4.Width = 170 UnnamedTable3.Width = 170 UnnamedTable2.Width = 170 &PadObs.Visible = False &auxTotPedQtd.Visible = False &OutProCod.Visible = False GridsdtFichaEstoques_Empowerer.GridInternalName = GridsdtFichaEstoques.InternalName GridsdtFichaEstoques.Rows = Page.Rows GridsdtFichaEstoquesPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue = GridsdtFichaEstoques.Rows
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
&PedDtaFat_to = serverdate()
padraoUsuario.Call('L', &Pgmname, &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, &PadObs, &PadDtaMod) &PedDtaFat = CtoD(Substr(&PadObs, 25, 10))
if &parmProCod.IsEmpty() &PedVenCod = val(Substr(&PadObs, 1, 8)) &PedCliCod = val(Substr(&PadObs, 9, 8)) &ProCod = trim(Substr(&PadObs, 17,8)) Else &ProCod = trim(&parmProCod) EndIF
&Ordernar = Substr(&PadObs, 45,1)
&oldProCod = '' &OldPedClICod = 0 &OldPedVenCod = 0 &ProGracod = 1
if &ProSolLot = SolicitarLote.SIM_CONTROLAR &GridPedItmCmpLot.Visible = 1 tbFiltroLote.Visible = 1 Else &GridPedItmCmpLot.Visible = 0 tbFiltroLote.Visible = 0 Endif
if 1=2 abreFichaEstoque.Link() EndIF
&ProCod.SetFocus()
EndEvent
Event Refresh
if &ProSolLot = SolicitarLote.SIM_CONTROLAR &GridPedItmCmpLot.Visible = 1 tbFiltroLote.Visible = 1 Else &GridPedItmCmpLot.Visible = 0 tbFiltroLote.Visible = 0 Endif sdtFichaEstoque__VlrCus.Visible = &EditarProduto > 1 sdtFichaEstoque__VlrUnt.Visible = &EditarProduto > 1
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
&GridsdtFichaEstoquesCurrentPage = GridsdtFichaEstoques.CurrentPage &GridsdtFichaEstoquesPageCount = GridsdtFichaEstoques.PageCount
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event GridsdtFichaEstoques.Load
sdtFichaEstoque__VlrCus.Visible = &EditarProduto > 1
&gridProRef = &sdtFichaEstoque.CurrentItem.ProRef &gridPedDtafat = &sdtFichaEstoque.CurrentItem.DtaFat &gridLctAtuEst = &sdtFichaEstoque.CurrentItem.AtuEst &gridLctCod = &sdtFichaEstoque.CurrentItem.LctCod &gridPedVenCod = &sdtFichaEstoque.CurrentItem.VenCod &GridPedItmCmpLot= &sdtFichaEstoque.CurrentItem.Lotes &gridPedCliCodRaz = &sdtFichaEstoque.CurrentItem.CliCRaz
&auxTotPedQtd = VAL(&sdtFichaEstoque.CurrentItem.QtdEst) &gridTotPedQtd = &sdtFichaEstoque.CurrentItem.QtdEst
&gridEntPedQtd.ForeColor = RGB(0,40,160) &gridSaiPedQtd.ForeColor = RGB(160,40,0)
&gridEntPedQtd = &sdtFichaEstoque.CurrentItem.QTdEnt &gridSaiPedQtd = &sdtFichaEstoque.CurrentItem.QtdSai
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
//this code should be inside the For Each used to load the grid
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
If &auxTotPedQtd < 0 &gridTotPedQtd.ForeColor = RGB(160,40,0) Else &gridTotPedQtd.ForeColor = RGB(0,40,160) EndIf
sdtFichaEstoque__PedCod.Link = VerPedido.Link('', &sdtFichaEstoque.CurrentItem.EmpCod, &sdtFichaEstoque.CurrentItem.FilCod, &sdtFichaEstoque.CurrentItem.PedCod) sdtFichaEstoque__PedCod.LinkTarget = '_blank'
if &sdtFichaEstoque.CurrentItem.PedSts = Status_Pedido.SEPARANDO &gridPedDtaFat.ForeColor = RGB(160,40,0) Else &gridPedDtaFat.ForeColor = RGB(0,0,0) EndIF
EndEvent
Event GridsdtFichaEstoquesPaginationBar.ChangePage
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
Do Case Case GridsdtFichaEstoquesPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Previous' GridsdtFichaEstoques.PreviousPage() Case GridsdtFichaEstoquesPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Next' &PageToGo = GridsdtFichaEstoques.CurrentPage &PageToGo += 1 GridsdtFichaEstoques.GotoPage(&PageToGo) Otherwise &PageToGo.FromString(GridsdtFichaEstoquesPaginationBar.SelectedPage) GridsdtFichaEstoques.GotoPage(&PageToGo) EndCase
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event GridsdtFichaEstoquesPaginationBar.ChangeRowsPerPage
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
GridsdtFichaEstoques.Rows = GridsdtFichaEstoquesPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue GridsdtFichaEstoques.FirstPage()
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event 'DoFiltrar'
do 'CarregaSDt' &ProCod.SetFocus()
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event 'DoConsultarEstoque'
wpConsultaEstoque.Link(&OutProCod)
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event 'DoPrintFicha'
RCOOpenWindow1.LinkOpen = RELJAS010.Link(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &OutProCod, &ProGracod, &PedDtaFat, &PedDtaFat_to, &PedCliCod, &PedVenCod) RCOOpenWindow1.OpenWindow(True, 500, 500, True, 0, 0, False)
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event &PedCliCod.ControlValueChanged
do 'CarregaSDt'
EndEvent
Event &PedVenCod.ControlValueChanged
do 'CarregaSDt'
EndEvent
Event &FIlCod.ControlValueChanged
do 'CarregaSDt'
EndEvent
Event &PEdDtaFat.ControlValueChanged
if &PEdDtaFat < &PEdDtaFat_to do 'CarregaSDt' Endif
EndEvent
Event &PEdDtaFat_to.ControlValueChanged
if &PEdDtaFat < &PEdDtaFat_to do 'CarregaSDt' EndIf
EndEvent
Event &ProCod.IsValid
if &oldProCod <> &ProCod &PedProEstLotCod = '' &oldProCod = &ProCod Do 'CarregaSDt' Endif
EndEvent
Event &Ordernar.ControlValueChanged
if &Ordernar = 'B' &sdtFichaEstoque.Sort('Count') Else &sdtFichaEstoque.Sort('[Count]') Endif
&PadObs = padL(trim(Str(&PedVenCod)), 8, ' ') &PadObs += padL(trim(Str(&PedCliCod)), 8, ' ') &PadObs += padL(trim(Str(&OutProCod)), 8, ' ') &PadObs += trim(toformattedString(&PedDtaFat)) &PadObs += trim(toformattedString(&PedDtaFat_to)) &PadObs += &Ordernar padraoUsuario.Call('G', &Pgmname, &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, &PadObs, &PadDtaMod)
Refresh
EndEvent
Event 'f4'
4 PromptProdutoGradeRef.Popup(&EmpCod, &OutProCod, &ProGracod, &ProCod) &ProCod.SetFocus()
EndEvent
Sub 'CarregaSDt'
if &oldProCod <> &ProCod &PedProEstLotCod = '' Endif &oldProCod = &ProCod
RetornaProdutoReferencia.Call(&EmpCod, &ProCod, &OutProCod, &ProGracod, &ProNom, &IsAchou, &ProReqVlr, &ProReqQtd, &ProBarQtd, &Mensagem) do 'loadProduto' if &ProCod.IsEmpty() &ProNom = '<-- INFORME CODIGO PRODUTO' &sdtFichaEstoque.Clear() Else if not &Mensagem.IsEmpty() &ProNom = &Mensagem Endif
RetornaDataInicialDiferencaMaxima.Call(&PedDtaFat, &PedDtaFat_to, 3)
RetornaSdtFichaEstoque.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &OutProCod, &ProGracod, &PedProEstLotCod, &PedDtaFat, &PedDtaFat_to, &PedCliCod, &PedVenCod, &qtdSaiPed, &SaiPedQtd, &qtdEntPed, &EntPedQtd, &AntEstQtd, &TotPedQtd, &sdtFichaEstoque) if &Ordernar <> 'B' &sdtFichaEstoque.Sort('[Count]') Endif EndIf
&PadObs = padL(trim(Str(&PedVenCod)), 8, ' ') &PadObs += padL(trim(Str(&PedCliCod)), 8, ' ') &PadObs += padL(trim(Str(&OutProCod)), 8, ' ') &PadObs += trim(toformattedString(&PedDtaFat)) &PadObs += trim(toformattedString(&PedDtaFat_to)) &PadObs += &Ordernar padraoUsuario.Call('G', &Pgmname, &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, &PadObs, &PadDtaMod)
Refresh
EndSub
Sub 'loadProduto'
&ProSolLot = SolicitarLote.NAO_CONTROLAR
&GridPedItmCmpLot.Visible = 0 tbFiltroLote.Visible = 0
For Each Order EmpCod, ProCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where ProCod = &OutProCod &ProSolLot = ProSolLot if ProSolLot = SolicitarLote.SIM_CONTROLAR &GridPedItmCmpLot.Visible = 1 tbFiltroLote.Visible = 1 Endif
Exit EndFor
EndSub
